name: Potato-Scallion Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Prick the potatoes all over with a fork or knife.
2. Microwave on high for 8 minutes until tender.
3. Remove from microwave and let cool slightly.
4. Peel the potatoes and coarsely grate them into a mixing bowl.
5. Add remaining ingredients (except oil) to the bowl and mix well until combined.
6. Form the mixture into fairly thin, 2-inch cakes.
7. Heat oil in a large skillet or pan to 375°F (190°C).
8. Fry the pancakes in small batches, turning occasionally, until golden brown on both sides.
9. Remove with a slotted spoon and drain on a paper towel-lined plate.
10. Keep warm in a low oven while frying remaining cakes.
11. Garnish as desired and serve hot or warm.
